TextENGNew: ``Keiichi, please wake up...@k@vS18/00/162700042. You'll be late, Keiichi...``
Mom was desperately calling out to me because I hadn't gotten up at the usual time.
``I'm getting up now...``
Even though I said that, I couldn't pull myself out of the futon.
My body was so heavy... like lead. To be more accurate, it was my heart that felt heavy.
A vision of Shion and Satoko lying in a pool of blood came back to me any time I closed my eyes.
That bloody kitchen knife laying on the ground... As I recalled it now, it still felt like I was holding it in the palm of my hand.
I'll take my revenge with this.
I'll have my revenge on the person who took my peaceful everyday life from me in an instant.
``Keiichi...!``
When I opened my eyes, Mom was standing before me.
``Feeling sick, huh?@k@vS18/00/162700045. Do you... need to stay home today?``
I frequently skipped school back in my old town, but I've been in good health since I moved here.
In the past, Mom would have just smacked me and dragged me out of the futon, but today she seemed really worried about me.
``Sorry...@k@vS18/01/160100648. Let me rest today.@k@vS18/01/160100649. I think I have a fever...``
I said whatever came to mind and tried to look apologetic.
``Oh, how unusual.@k@vS18/00/162700047. Then I'll let Rena-chan know when she comes to pick you up.@k@vS18/00/162700048. I'm sure Rena-chan will be disappointed you're staying home today...``
Mom said that cheerfully.
She'd be disappointed, huh...?
...Actually, I wonder what kind of face I'd make if I had to see Rena? What kind of face would Rena be making at a time like this?

My heart ached every time I thought of yesterday, that day where I was roaring like a ferocious beast at Satoko's house. Every time I told myself that I'd had no other choice, a feeling of emptiness sprang up.
I have no idea what I'm supposed to live for now. ...Maybe clinging to my hatred is the best way to go on living.
``I'll get you some cold medicine.``
Mom left the room. Perhaps she'd grown tired of my silence.
...I didn't need cold medicine.
I wanted to say that, but I decided to keep quiet.
Silence once again filled the room.
The day we killed Teppei Houjou in the forest felt like so long ago.
The world has changed since that day.
When Satoko screamed in despair after witnessing me mercilessly beat Teppei Houjou to death... that was when it changed.
I wonder why all of this happened?
Who killed Shion...?
And why did Satoko have to die like that...? With her throat torn apart...
If Shion's story was accurate, it was similar to Tomitake-san's death. He clawed out his throat with his own fingernails. And he ultimately died from the excessive blood loss.
The police suspected that Tomitake-san's death was a suicide, but if that was the case then it suggested Satoko's death was also a suicide.
Satoko committing suicide...? Why? That's impossible.
I once again recalled the scene of Satoko with her throat torn wide open.
However, it became completely unbearable after just two seconds. The terrible sight and repulsive bloody scent of Satoko's corpse was burned into my memory.
``That's unusual.@k@vS18/00/162700051. I wonder if Rena is out sick today too...?``
Mom came back with the cold medicine.
Normally, if I wasn't at our usual meeting place Rena would worry about me and come to my house to check on me.
My normal, everyday life. I never thought it was so fragile.
I tossed the cold medicine in my mouth and drank a sip of water right away.
There was nothing wrong with my body, but taking cold medicine wouldn't make it any worse.
``Alright, I'll go give the school a call.@k@vS18/00/162700053. Behave yourself.``
Instead of responding, I simply closed my eyes.
I wanted to sleep like this for the rest of my life. ...To get away from everything.
If I could just have a pleasant dream where I played and had club activities with Satoko, Shion, Rena, Mion, and Rika-chan forever, I wouldn't need anything else...
That was all I wanted...
I softly begged for it...
Not sure if it was thanks to the cold medicine or not, but before I knew it I fell asleep.
*riiiiiing*
*riiiiiing*
*riiiiiing*
The phone was ringing.
*riiiiiing*
*riiiiiing*
I guess Mom went out...? And I guess Dad is out too?
Where could they have gone...?
*riiiiiing*
*riiiiiing*
The phone kept ringing, nonstop.
....I was getting sick of it, but I gave up. ...I was in no mood to listen to a telemarketer's poor sales pitch right now.
They're trying to reach Mom or Dad, but I guess they're both out?
Come on, just leave me alone.
*riiiiiing*
*riiiiiing*
The caller was far too persistent.
It caused the lingering unease in my heart to gradually grow stronger.
I didn't know why.
But I just had a feeling... that the person on the other end of the phone would deliver me even more bad news.
I headed downstairs. I stood there and watched the phone ring for a while.
If I pick up that phone, another wave of unfortunate events will be unleashed. I thought that for a second, but the next moment I picked up the receiver.
The atmosphere grew tense as I heard a very faint voice on the other end of the phone.
Who is it...? As I thought that, I tried to say something, but just then I heard the other person's voice.
Hearing that voice made all the blood in my body run cold.
``Thank goodness...!@k@vS18/06/160600448. I finally got through!@k@vS18/06/160600449. This is Kei-chan, right?!``
...Impossible!
I thought back nostalgically as I heard a lovely, familiar voice.
And the owner of that voice...... was Shion, who should already be dead!
``Sheesh, I thought you'd never pick up.@k@vS18/06/160600451. When I asked Sis, she said you were off school today...@k@vS18/06/160600452. So, what on earth happened...?``
Shion was talking in her usual cheery tone.
What are you doing, Shion...? Yesterday... you were dead, right?!
``Kei-chan...?@k@vS18/06/160600454. Is everything all right?``
``Oh... yeah.@k@vS18/01/160100652. Sorry.@k@vS18/01/160100653. It seems I've caught a cold today.``
I tried to keep the conversation calm while assessing my opponent's attitude.
A dead person was calling me. I desperately pondered the meaning of that while listening to the bright voice coming in through the receiver.
``Are you feeling ok?@k@vS18/06/160600456. Sheesh, were you already in bed, sleeping with your stomach out?``
``I'll be all right. Hahaha.@k@vS18/01/160100655. I'd never do something like that.``
``Yeah, of course. Aahahahaha!@k@vS18/06/160600458. But Kei-chan, you do sound like you need some sleep.@k@vS18/06/160600459. Maybe we should lie down together?``
Our meaningless conversation continued. I tried to be cheery and tried to stay calm as I spun together whatever words I could muster.
``Sure. I'm fine with that!@k@vS18/01/160100657. But if you're next to me, you'll keep me up all night!``
``What are you saying?!@k@vS18/06/160600461. Unlike you, Kei-chan, I'm a gentle sleeper!``
``Yeah right.@k@vS18/01/160100659. In reality, you'd be kicking and shoving me all night, and claim you didn't remember any of it when you woke up.@k@vS18/01/160100660. You know that, right?``
``Kei-chan, you're terrible!@k@vS18/06/160600463. Maybe you're not entirely wrong, but that's going too far!@k@vS18/06/160600464. Well, should we try it to find out if it's true?``
``I'll have to decline, ahahahaha.``
This was a game of catch, throwing meaningless words back and forth to pass the time.
When I realized that, I stopped laughing.
Who am I really talking to right now...?
Or rather... maybe I should be asking... who was that corpse at Satoko's house...?
``Is something wrong, Kei-chan?``
``No... it's nothing.@k@vS18/01/160100665. ......Anyway, did you need something?``
``You left a message on my answering machine, didn't you?``
``Answering machine...?``
``Right.@k@vS18/06/160600470. You said it was urgent and you needed to ask something...``
Oh, that's right.
Yesterday, Rena, Rika-chan, and I were all desperately searching for Shion together, in an effort to locate Satoko.
It's crazy that I was already forgetting something like that. I banged my head with my fist to sharpen my senses.
``Kei-chan, are you all right?@k@vS18/06/160600472. Have you taken any cold medicine? Do you need me to go over there?``
``...No, I'm fine.@k@vS18/01/160100668. I took some cold medicine earlier...``
On the chest, sides, stomach, back, neck, and legs... Shion was shedding blood from all over her body while lying on the floor at Satoko's house yesterday.
And Satoko was laying there too, with her throat torn apart like it was ripped open.
...Could all of that have been a hallucination?
Could the two of them still be alive and well somewhere? Was I mistaken in thinking I saw the both of them...?
``Well if you don't need anything else, I have to get going to my part-time job, ok?``
``Shion...``
``Yesterday... did you go to your part time job like usual...?``
``......Come on, Kei-chan.@k@vS18/06/160600476. What are you saying?@k@vS18/06/160600477. Of course I did.``
``And did you go home afterwards...?``
``Of course.@k@vS18/06/160600479. Please, don't imply I'm some sort of juvenile delinquent!``
``Yes, I did...``
``So you did, then...``
The silence continued.
If she went home yesterday, wouldn't someone have seen her? ...Ooishi was supposed to be waiting in front of her house, right?
Didn't that seem unusual?
And what happened to Satoko?
Was she really about to head to Angel Mort? Did she go yesterday too? Why would she lie about that?
Even though there were a lot of things I wanted to ask, she'd probably dodge all of my questions.
``Alright, I'll drop off now if you don't have anything else.@k@vS18/06/160600484. Get well soon.``
``Please, wait...!``
I immediately began squeezing the receiver tight.
``...I just remembered.@k@vS18/01/160100678. About the weapons.``
``Weapons...?``
``On the night... when Teppei was killed.@k@vS18/01/160100680. Shion, did you bring the weapons home with you?``
``Yes. So what...?``
Shion responded like it was perfectly natural.
My heart was racing.
Shion wasn't responsible for weapons disposal. ......Rena was.
``Well... Rena was saying we should move them to our secret location.``
``Oh, is that so?@k@vS18/06/160600489. ...But it's already taken care of.@k@vS18/06/160600490. I threw them away in a place nobody will ever find them.``
``Well, that's no good.@k@vS18/01/160100683. ...Because we may need to use them once more...``
``......What are you saying?``
My heart was beating wildly.
``Sorry...@k@vS18/01/160100685. I can't say over the phone...``
``Do you think we can meet up after this?@k@vS18/01/160100687. ...At Rena's hideout.@k@vS18/01/160100688. ...The garbage mountain.``
``...The police... are starting to suspect us.``
Then, the other end of the receiver went silent.
Shion, tell me you're willing to come...
...If you're going to continue using Shion's name.
``Understood.@k@vS18/06/160600496. Then I need to get going now.``
Then she hung up.
...Shion is coming...! With weapons she couldn't have possibly taken home.
I'm sure Rena will be at the garbage mountain today too.
If Rena didn't go to school, I'm sure she'll be over there.
I had no grounds for that, but I was convinced...
I changed my clothes and put on my shoes.
Then I grabbed an empty bag, hid the thing I found in the kitchen inside of it, and then left the house.
Evening had already fallen by the time I reached the garbage mountain at the dam construction site.
As I parked my bike, I looked for signs of Rena's presence.
Although I couldn't see Rena, I caught sight of her bike mixed in with the scrap.
I carefully watched my step as I descended the garbage slope.
...What have I been doing all day today?
I skipped school and spent the day hiding in bed to escape reality.
I got a phone call from Shion, who was supposed to be dead... and I invited her here.
It all felt so unreal.
None of it was in line with my everyday thoughts.
And what remained was a set of unbelievable facts.
A person who couldn't possibly be alive somehow was, and a person who ought to be here was dead...
``Kei-chan!``
When I turned around, I saw Shion coming down the garbage slope.
Shion, who the hell are you...?
I felt like I had an idea what the answer was...
Shion turned to me with a bright, innocent smile...... No, that's not Shion!
``You're...... Mion, aren't you?``
``Huh? ...What are you talking about, Kei-chan?@k@vS18/06/160600499. Please, look closely.@k@vS18/06/160600500. It's me, Shion.``
``...What's the big idea?``
``What's gotten into you all of a sudden?@k@vS18/06/160600502. Did something happen?``
Shion just stared blankly at me.
My confidence was wavering.
Is it possible that this is actually Shion...?
The Shion standing before me was staring at me with her eyes open wide.
In my mind, those eyes overlapped with the lifeless eyes of the Shion I found dead at Satoko's house yesterday.
The corpse I saw yesterday definitely had the same face as this person.
So the person who was supposed to be dead speaking to me was a living contradiction.
Impossible...!
The person standing in front of me can't possibly be Shion!
``Shion is... already dead.``
Shion... No, Mion audibly gasped.
``So you... are actually Mion.``
Mion's eyes darted in every direction.
She held a hand up to her mouth to hide the look of dismay on her face.
``Shion is dead...? ...What... do you mean...?``
Her voice was trembling. ...From fear, and the awful truth she was about to hear.
``Stop imitating Shion already.@k@vS18/01/160100697. ...Why did you deceive us...?@k@vS18/01/160100698. That's all I want to know...``
Mion immediately started apologizing.
She slipped on her footing and knocked over some cans on the ground as she knelt down and pressed both her hands together.
``...You don't have to apologize.@k@vS18/01/160100700. It won't make a difference at this point.``
``...Y-You and Rena... have been acting weird for a while.@k@vS18/03/160300159. S-so... I didn't mean to deceive you, you know?``
``You don't need to say anything about that.@k@vS18/01/160100702. I just want to know why you're impersonating Shion.``
``I, I'm... sorry.@k@vS18/03/160300161. I was... I was starting to think that this was going to turn into Satoshi all over again...``
``Satoshi?``
Satoshi... Satoko's older brother. The one who disappeared and left Satoko behind, Satoko's Nii-nii.

``Right before Watanagashi... you, Rena, and Shion were all meeting up to plan something, right?@k@vS18/03/160300163. ...So I was getting concerned that there was more going on.@k@vS18/03/160300164. And wondering... if you didn't consider me a friend anymore...``
``You were intentionally keeping secrets from me.@k@vS18/03/160300166. ...At the time... it made me feel a little lonely.``
``So I tried calling Shion to ask what she was planning...@k@vS18/03/160300168. I tried calling, but... I couldn't ask anything.``

``It seemed like Shion didn't trust me...@k@vS18/03/160300170. It felt like she wouldn't talk to me.@k@vS18/03/160300171. But I was starting to feel concerned...@k@vS18/03/160300172. Honestly, I was really worried about you and everyone else, Kei-chan.``
``...And then, after Watanagashi was over, and Teppei Houjou was gone...@k@vS18/03/160300174. Satoko and Shion both disappeared...``
Mion raised her eyebrows as she anxiously looked up at me.
I didn't understand your story, Mion.
You impersonated Shion because you wanted to be our friend...?
I couldn't understand it at all.
Stop apologizing. ......It's meaningless.
``Please, Kei-chan.@k@vS18/03/160300181. ...Don't look at me with those eyes.@k@vS18/03/160300182. I'm sorry.@k@vS18/03/160300183. I'm sorry.@k@vS18/03/160300184. I'm sorry...``
``Knowing Shion's personality... I was worried that... maybe... she was the one who killed Teppei...@k@vS18/03/160300186. ...And that's why Shion ran away... and disappeared...!``
She must have deduced from our stories that all three of us were involved in Teppei's murder.

``So when Shion ran off alone... I thought it would be best to create an alibi for her.@k@vS18/03/160300188. So, I started pretending to be Shion.@k@vS18/03/160300189. ...That's all there is to it.@k@vS18/03/160300190. Please believe me...``
``No more lies, Mii-chan.``
Before I realized it, Rena was standing behind Mion.
Mion's eyes fixated on the massive hatchet Rena was holding.
``Hey, Mii-chan.@k@vS18/02/160200482. ...Your story doesn't add up.@k@vS18/02/160200483. Why did you have to kill Satoko-chan too?``
``Don't play dumb, you liar!``
Rena swung her hatchet down. It let out a loud ``clang!`` as it sliced into the hood of a car by her feet.

``That was a dirty thing you did, Mii-chan.@k@vS18/02/160200486. ...And you're still playing dirty now.@k@vS18/02/160200487. You've got some nerve to say you were trying to protect Shii-chan when you were the one who killed her.``
``And the reason you pretended not to notice all of Satoko-chan's suffering was because you were planning to kill her on the day of Watanagashi, right?``
``R-Rena, what are you talking about?@k@vS18/03/160300198. I don't understand what you're saying at all...``
``Don't play dumb!@k@vS18/02/160200490. You wanted to be our friend...?@k@vS18/02/160200491. Don't make me laugh.@k@vS18/02/160200492. We were never friends to begin with, were we?!``
Mion looked up at me like she was begging.
However, all I could do was coldly gaze back at her.
Mion... What you've done can never be taken back...!
``...It was all the curse, wasn't it?@k@vS18/01/160100705. Oyashiro-sama's.@k@vS18/01/160100706. The Sonozaki family made it all happen, right?@k@vS18/01/160100707. ...The curse of Oyashiro-sama.``
``Kei-chan!@k@vS18/03/160300201. Y... you're all acting so weird!@k@vS18/03/160300202. What are you talking about? I don't understand any of it!``
``You planned to eradicate the entire Houjou family from the start.@k@vS18/02/160200494. That's why you killed Satoko-chan.``
``Y-you're wrong... Wrong!@k@vS18/03/160300204. It wasn't me!@k@vS18/03/160300205. I've never even thought of doing something like that to Satoko!!``

``That's enough, Mion.@k@vS18/01/160100709. ...The more you deny it, the more it sounds like a downright lie.@k@vS18/01/160100710. You killed Satoko, and you killed Shion for trying to defend Satoko.@k@vS18/01/160100711. ...Did you have a reason to kill Tomitake-san and Takano-san too?``
Tears began falling from Mion's eyes.
Mion clapped both her hands together and bowed while sobbing profusely.
``The curse of Oyashiro-sama...@k@vS18/01/160100713. You didn't want to carry it out, did you?@k@vS18/01/160100714. But it was a direct order from the Sonozaki family, so you had no choice?``

``It's unfortunate, Mii-chan.@k@vS18/02/160200496. ...That you were caught in the middle of this.@k@vS18/02/160200497. Keiichi-kun and I were next, weren't we?@k@vS18/02/160200498. ...Your next targets, that is.``
``Shut up, shut up!``
I took out the kitchen knife I hid in the bag.
The knife that was lying beside Satoko and Shion yesterday. The one that spilled the blood of my precious friends.
``Kei-chan...!``
Mion gasped as she opened her eyes wide in despair.
Hey, Keiichi. Forgive her already...
She's apologized enough, hasn't she?
She did something that can never be taken back.
But even so, forgive her. Because this won't bring the two of them back.
Mion's face was drenched with tears. That miserable face was the same Mion who always smiled about club activities.
...In those days, we were all around Satoko and everyone was smiling together.
``The yellow one is probably broccoli, and the blue one is cauliflower... but the green one is... umm... uh...``
``Oh my, it looks like a home economics lesson. ...Well, Satoko, what's thiiis?``
Mion used her chopsticks to pick up a little green morsel wrapped in bacon.
``...But that's aspara... mmgh.``
I held Rika-chan's mouth closed.
``Umm, uh! Umm... the yellow one is cauliflower... no, the green one is caulifl...``
``Well which is it?! Hmm?!``
``Then answer!``
``...I know this... I know this... uwaaaaaaaah!!``
Satoko cried out, unable to bear it any longer. When Rena saw that, she held her head and pinched her cheeks.
``...H-hau~... k-kyuuute...``
...That was our everyday life.
When a salty taste entered my mouth, I realized I was crying.
Mion was still apologizing by my feet.
As the dusk began to settle in, the cries of the higurashi grew even louder.
The wind had gotten a lot cooler... it seemed like good weather for everyone to play together.
``Mii-chan...@k@vS18/02/160200501. I'm sorry...@k@vS18/02/160200502. Honestly, I didn't want to do this...@k@vS18/02/160200503. You'll understand that, right?``
Rena tightly gripped her hatchet.
Her cheeks were soaking wet.
Rena was crying too, without making a sound.
I clenched the kitchen knife I was holding.
In the same moment that Rena swung her hatchet, I rushed in with the kitchen knife.
I felt like I could hear Mion's cheerful voice mixed in with the groans of pain.

``Aa ha ha ha!@k@vS18/03/160300239. Kei-chan, this doesn't suit you at all!@k@vS18/03/160300240. What do you want to do for today's club activity?@k@vS18/03/160300241. Don't forget about the punishment game......``
Maybe I just didn't want to hear Mion's final words.
I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry...
Mion's voice echoed inside my head and synchronized with my own feelings.
Maybe I was the one who wanted to apologize...
Mion...
I just wanted to regain our happy days...!
It wasn't supposed to end this way...! Nobody... nobody wanted this...!!
